summary: Phase 4 PhD-level analysis of the Decision Engine: Trinity Core (1797 lines, 110KB) dissected into its 4 decision stages, 30+ veto gates, 20+ sovereignty bypasses, God-Mode reversal, Monte Carlo validation, and structural SL/TP anchoring. Shadow Engine counterfactual analysis included. Critical bugs identified including dead code, duplicate metadata keys, and orphaned _check_vetos method.
